word: H1633 - גָּרַם - gâram - gaw-ram' - Gnaw the bones

sections.paragraph:
Original: גּרם

Transliteration: gâram

Phonetic: gaw-ram'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cut off, reserve, lay aside, leave, save
    1. (Qal) to reserve
  2. (Piel) to break bones, gnaw bones, break

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 382b

Part(s) of speech: Verb
